title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for maximizing productivity with Claude Code: LLM Knowledge Bases, Auto-Research, and Context Engineering. The video demonstrates how to apply these principles to accelerate software development output.
